title: What widget can I use to show items by priority, date, & assignee?
excerpt:
Hi, 
What widget can I use where I can show the following parameters: 
Priority Level (Medium, High, Low) vs. Daily vs. Person 
Thank you!

posts.author: TJ_S (TJS)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

What widget can I use where I can show the following parameters:

Priority Level (Medium, High, Low) vs. Daily vs. Person

Thank you!

posts.author: BenP-monday.com (Ben Purzak)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @TJ_S. Thanks for the question! It sounds like a chart widget could work for what you’re looking to do. Maybe a Bar chart where the X-axis is Person and the Y-axis is the status column that has labels for Low, Medium, High. Then, you can filter this chart by date in the widget filters. Could this work for what you’re looking to do?

Best,
Ben

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
